title: Non-record: Hybrid Depth-Recurrent Transformer + Int5 Quantization Studies
body:
## Two non-record submissions

### 1. Hybrid Depth-Recurrent Transformer (1.2334 BPB)
**Solved quantization compounding** for looped layers (0.40 BPB gap → 0.007). 8 physical layers × 2 loops = 16 effective depth from 20M stored params. Novel input features (word-position, copy flags, unigram frequency). Full details in records/track_non_record_16mb/2026-03-22_HybridLoopedTransformer_8xH100/

### 2. Content-Dependent SmearGate (negative result at scale)
H100 validation showed content-dependent gating adds step overhead that doesn't compensate. Details in records/track_non_record_16mb/2026-03-20_ContentSmearGate_RTX4070/

Built on PR #315 by @alertcat.
